description: A single funding URL published by a steward. Points to the steward's external funding page — the human-friendly entry point.

main.description: The steward's canonical funding entry point. A single URL where people can support this entity.

url.description: The canonical funding page URL (e.g. GitHub Sponsors, Open Collective, ko-fi, or a custom landing page).

createdAt.description: When this record was created or last updated.
